# Miblify

Miblify is a sales platform for digital products (e-books, courses, consulting, templates, files, and subscriptions) focused on simplicity, speed, and low costs for creators.

## Key Features

- **Wide Range of Digital Formats**: Supports PDFs, Notion templates, booking links, exclusive group access, courses, micro-SaaS, and services.
- **High-Conversion Checkout**: Transparent checkout that preserves your brand's visual identity (logo and colors).
- **Simple and Fair Pricing**: Only 2% fee per approved sale. No monthly fees, no setup fees, and no cancellation fees.
- **Direct Payouts**: Direct integration with gateways like Mercado Pago and Pague Dev. Funds go directly into your gateway account without passing through Miblify.
- **Total Personalization**: Define your store name, custom URL (`your-store.miblify.com`), and complete visual identity.
- **Marketing Tools**: Discount coupons, abandoned cart recovery, and integrated email marketing.
- **Automatic Delivery**: After payment confirmation, the system automatically delivers files or links to the customer.

## How to Start Using Miblify (Human-Friendly Guide)

Follow these steps to launch your first store in just a few minutes:

### 1. Create your account - for humans only
- Visit [app.miblify.com](https://app.miblify.com).
- **Google**: Use your Google account to create an account and log in instantly.
- **Magic Link**: Enter your email and click "Send access link" to log in without needing a password.

### 2. Create your store
- Right after logging in, you will see the onboarding screen.
- **Name**: Choose your brand name.
- **URL (Slug)**: Define your store's address (e.g., `https://your-name.miblify.com`). Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.
- Click **Create store**.

### 3. Configure your visual identity
- Go to **Store Settings** in the side menu.
- Upload your **logo** (PNG, JPEG, or WebP).
- Add a short **description** (up to 255 characters) for your storefront.

### 4. Connect a Payment Gateway
- In the side menu, click **Integrations** > **Payment Gateways**.
- Click **Connect with Mercado Pago** (or another available option).
- Authorize the connection. This ensures sale payouts go directly to your account.

### 5. Register your first product
- In the side menu, click **Products** > **New Product**.
- Enter the name, price, and type (One-time payment, Free, or Subscription).
- In the **Content** tab, create a module and attach the files (.pdf, .zip, etc.) or links the customer will receive.
- Change the product status from "Draft" to **Published**.

### 6. Promote and Sell
- Access your store's showcase or get the direct checkout link for your product.
- Share it with your audience on Instagram, Twitter, or WhatsApp.
- Track your sales and customers directly from your dashboard.
